name: Beef Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 Sandwich or Roll Steaks (about 6 oz each)
2 ounces Salt Pork (or 2 Bacon strips, cut into long thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay the steaks on a flat surface. Spread each with mustard and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Divide pickles, salt pork (or bacon), and onion among the steaks equally.
3. Roll up the steaks in a jelly-roll fashion and secure with beef roll clamps, toothpicks, or thread.
4. Heat oil in a heavy saucepan. Add the steak rolls and brown well on all sides for about 15 minutes.
5. Pour in hot beef broth, peppercorns, and bay leaf. Cover and simmer for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
6. Remove the beef rolls, discard clamps, and arrange on a preheated platter.
7. Blend cornstarch with a small amount of cold water. Stir into the gravy and bring to a boil.
8. Continue boiling until the gravy is thick and bubbly. Correct seasonings and serve separately.
